# criblio_parser_lib_entry (Resource)

ParserLibEntry Resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "criblio_parser_lib_entry" "my_parser_lib_entry" {
  description = "Parser for CSV-formatted log data"
  group_id = "default"
  id = "csv-log-parser"
  lib = "custom"
  type = "csv"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tools/codegen -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (String) Worker group ID.
- `id` (String)
- `type` (String)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `lib` (String)
- `tags` (String) Optionally, add tags that you can use for filtering

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = criblio_parser_lib_entry.my_criblio_parser_lib_entry
  id = jsonencode({
    group_id = "Cribl"
    id       = "parser-json"
  })
}
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import criblio_parser_lib_entry.my_criblio_parser_lib_entry '{"group_id": "Cribl", "id": "parser-json"}'
```
